extra.reason: Fixed: Changed driver from sqlite3 to sqlite in config validation, added modernc.org/sqlite import
Fixed: Added GetReviewEventIDAndStatus and ClearReviewEventID methods. Publisher now checks status=published before skipping and clears provisional event ID on publish failure.
Fixed: TryAuthorizeFreeReview now properly returns commit errors instead of silently converting them to false
Fixed: Changed comparison from < to > so listener uses the more recent timestamp (hwm vs lookback) instead of always using the older one

Fixed payment token timing issue. Token is now marked as 'token_spent' immediately after melting, creating a recoverable state before authorization. If subscription creation or authorization fails, the token_spent status prevents fund loss and enables reconciliation. Updated schema, added MarkReviewPaymentTokenSpent method, updated IsTokenHashUsed to prevent double-spending during recovery window. All tests pass.
Fixed by creating extractor per Build() call instead of sharing one. Tree-sitter parsers are mutable and now thread-safe. All tests pass.

Fixed race condition by implementing atomic check-and-increment in Store interface. Added CheckAndIncrementRateLimit() method that uses SQL transactions (SQLStore) and mutex locking (MemoryStore) to prevent concurrent requests from exceeding rate limit. Added concurrency test to verify fix. All tests pass.

Fixed: canonical repo config is now read from a distinct canonical cache path for PR tips and patch series, preventing fork-populated caches from influencing review policy. Added regression coverage and verified go test ./... passes.
Wired payment authorization into runtime/pipeline, applied per-endpoint LLM API keys, made embedding dimension configurable, and registered subscribed event handlers.

All Nostr-native event migrations complete

Restored DRY-AC3 audit half: PublishReview now emits a signed paired cascadia.CAS_AUDIT review-published event with repo, patch, review, and reviewer tags; publisher tests assert the paired audit; GOPRIVATE/BuildKit gitauth added for cascadia-go v0.2.1. Verified GOPRIVATE=git.sharegap.net/* go build ./... and go test ./....
Adopted cascadia-go/contextvm constants and bumped cascadia-go to v0.6.0; retained thin drydock transport wrapper for fiatjaf nostr integration gap.
